steps.name: Schema migration: evidence_refs, evidence_verification on intent; evidence_enforcement on workspace
steps.criteria: GIVEN a SurrealDB instance with the base schema applied WHEN the evidence migration runs THEN the intent table accepts evidence_refs (array of record references) and evidence_verification (object), and the workspace table accepts evidence_enforcement (string enum: bootstrap, soft, hard) with default 'soft'

steps.name: Evidence types, constants, MCP tool definition, handler, and intent query persistence
steps.criteria: GIVEN an agent calls create_intent via MCP with evidence_refs containing valid table:id references to existing decision and task records WHEN the intent is created and evaluated THEN the intent record contains the evidence_refs array, verification pipeline confirms both references exist in the workspace, evidence_verification result is stored on the intent record with verified_count 2, and evaluation completes successfully

steps.name: Soft enforcement: missing evidence elevates risk score
steps.criteria: GIVEN a workspace in soft enforcement mode WHEN an agent submits an intent without evidence_refs THEN the effective risk score is higher than the base risk score by the configured penalty amount AND the intent is routed to veto window instead of auto-approval

steps.name: Agent submits intent with valid evidence references via MCP
steps.criteria: GIVEN an agent calls create_intent via MCP with evidence_refs containing two valid table:id strings WHEN the handler validates the input THEN evidence_refs are parsed to RecordId objects, persisted on the intent record, and retrievable from the intent query

steps.name: Agent submits intent without evidence references
steps.criteria: GIVEN an agent calls create_intent via MCP without an evidence_refs field WHEN the intent is created THEN the intent record has no evidence_refs field AND evidence verification produces a result with verified_count 0 and total_count 0

steps.name: Agent cannot submit references to unsupported entity types
steps.criteria: GIVEN an agent calls create_intent via MCP with evidence_refs containing a reference to an unsupported table (e.g. conversation:abc123) WHEN the handler validates the input THEN the request is rejected with an error identifying the unsupported entity type

steps.name: All evidence references pass verification
steps.criteria: GIVEN an intent with evidence_refs pointing to two records that exist in the same workspace with valid statuses WHEN the evidence verification pipeline runs THEN all references pass existence, scope, temporal, and liveness checks AND the result shows verified_count equal to total_count with zero failed_refs

steps.name: Non-existent evidence reference fails verification
steps.criteria: GIVEN an intent with evidence_refs containing a reference to a record ID that does not exist in SurrealDB WHEN the evidence verification pipeline runs THEN the non-existent reference fails the existence check AND failed_refs includes the reference with reason 'not_found'

steps.name: Cross-workspace evidence reference fails scope check
steps.criteria: GIVEN an intent in workspace A with evidence_refs pointing to a record that exists in workspace B WHEN the evidence verification pipeline runs THEN the cross-workspace reference fails the scope check AND failed_refs includes the reference with reason 'scope_mismatch'

steps.name: Superseded decision fails liveness check
steps.criteria: GIVEN an intent with evidence_refs pointing to a decision with status 'superseded' WHEN the evidence verification pipeline runs THEN the superseded decision fails the liveness check AND failed_refs includes the reference with reason 'not_live'

steps.name: Evidence created after intent fails temporal check
steps.criteria: GIVEN an intent created at time T with evidence_refs pointing to a record created at time T+1 WHEN the evidence verification pipeline runs THEN the future-dated reference fails the temporal check AND failed_refs includes the reference with reason 'temporal_violation'

steps.name: Evidence shortfall elevates risk under soft enforcement
steps.criteria: GIVEN a workspace in soft enforcement mode AND a low-risk tier requiring 1 evidence reference WHEN an intent is submitted with zero evidence references THEN the risk router applies the shortfall penalty (default +20 per missing reference) to the effective risk score

steps.name: Full evidence keeps risk unchanged under soft enforcement
steps.criteria: GIVEN a workspace in soft enforcement mode AND a low-risk tier requiring 1 evidence reference WHEN an intent is submitted with 1 valid evidence reference that passes all verification checks THEN the risk router does not apply any evidence penalty AND the effective risk score equals the base risk score

steps.name: Verification result persisted with count and timing
steps.criteria: GIVEN an intent with evidence_refs that has completed evaluation WHEN the intent record is queried from SurrealDB THEN the evidence_verification field contains verified_count, total_count, failed_refs array, and verification_ms timing

steps.name: Failed references individually identified in verification result
steps.criteria: GIVEN an intent with 3 evidence_refs where 1 does not exist and 1 is in a different workspace WHEN the evidence verification pipeline runs THEN the verification result contains exactly 2 entries in failed_refs each with the specific reference ID and distinct failure reason

steps.name: R2 schema migration and MCP tool surface for evidence_refs
steps.criteria: GIVEN the R2 migration runs THEN intent.evidence_verification gains independent_author_count (int), tier_met (bool), enforcement_mode (string) fields AND workspace gains evidence_enforcement_threshold (object with min_decisions, min_tasks) AND the createIntentSchema Zod schema includes evidence_refs as optional array of strings with describe guidance AND the CREATE_INTENT_TOOL description explains evidence submission, valid entity types, and enforcement impact

steps.name: Proxy context injects workspace enforcement mode for agent awareness
steps.criteria: GIVEN a workspace with evidence_enforcement set to 'hard' WHEN the proxy builds the brain-context XML block for an agent session THEN the context includes the workspace enforcement mode AND the context cache fetches enforcement mode alongside existing context

steps.name: High-risk intent passes with 2 independent author references
steps.criteria: GIVEN a high-risk intent with 3 evidence_refs where 2 are authored by different agents (not the requesting agent) WHEN the evidence verification pipeline runs THEN independent_author_count is 2 AND tier_met is true AND the intent proceeds to evaluation

steps.name: Self-referencing evidence fails authorship check for high-risk intent
steps.criteria: GIVEN a high-risk intent where all evidence_refs are authored by the requesting agent WHEN the evidence verification pipeline runs THEN independent_author_count is 0 AND tier_met is false AND the verification result includes a warning about self-referencing

steps.name: Agent-confirmed decision counts as independent evidence
steps.criteria: GIVEN a decision confirmed by a human (not the requesting agent) WHEN it is included as evidence for a high-risk intent THEN the decision's confirming author is counted as an independent author in the authorship check

steps.name: Low-risk intent has no authorship independence requirement
steps.criteria: GIVEN a low-risk intent with 1 evidence_ref authored by the requesting agent WHEN the evidence verification pipeline runs THEN the intent passes tier requirements because low-risk tier requires 0 independent authors

steps.name: Recently created evidence fails minimum age check
steps.criteria: GIVEN an intent with evidence_refs pointing to a decision created 30 seconds ago WHEN the workspace requires minimum evidence age of 5 minutes THEN the reference fails the age check AND failed_refs includes the reference with reason 'too_recent'

steps.name: Hard enforcement rejects zero evidence before LLM evaluation
steps.criteria: GIVEN a workspace in hard enforcement mode WHEN an agent submits an intent with zero evidence_refs THEN the intent is rejected before the LLM evaluator runs AND the intent status is 'failed' with error_reason containing 'evidence' AND no evaluation result exists on the intent

steps.name: Hard enforcement passes sufficient evidence to LLM evaluation
steps.criteria: GIVEN a workspace in hard enforcement mode WHEN an agent submits an intent with sufficient evidence_refs that pass all verification checks THEN the intent proceeds to LLM evaluation AND evaluation completes with evidence context in the evaluator prompt

steps.name: Low-risk tier requirement satisfied with 1 reference of any type
steps.criteria: GIVEN a low-risk intent (risk score 0-30) with 1 evidence_ref of type observation WHEN the tier evaluator runs THEN tier_met is true because low-risk requires only 1 reference of any type

steps.name: High-risk intent fails when all references are observations only
steps.criteria: GIVEN a high-risk intent (risk score 71-100) with 3 evidence_refs all of type observation WHEN the tier evaluator runs THEN tier_met is false because high-risk requires at least one decision AND at least one task or observation

steps.name: Medium-risk meets requirement with decision reference and independent author
steps.criteria: GIVEN a medium-risk intent (risk score 31-70) with 2 evidence_refs including a decision authored by a different agent WHEN the tier evaluator runs THEN tier_met is true because medium-risk requires 2+ refs with decision or task type and 1 independent author

steps.name: Workspace auto-transitions from soft to hard enforcement at maturity threshold
steps.criteria: GIVEN a workspace in soft enforcement mode with evidence_enforcement_threshold of min_decisions: 5 and min_tasks: 10 WHEN the workspace has 5+ confirmed decisions and 10+ completed tasks AND an intent is evaluated THEN the workspace enforcement mode is automatically updated to hard AND subsequent intents are evaluated under hard enforcement

steps.name: Policy defines stricter evidence requirements for financial actions
steps.criteria: GIVEN an active policy with rule type 'evidence_requirement' targeting action 'financial_transfer' requiring min_count 3 and required_types ['decision', 'task'] WHEN an intent for financial_transfer is evaluated with only 1 evidence_ref THEN the policy gate applies the stricter requirement AND the intent fails tier evaluation

steps.name: Policy overrides default tier requirements for specific action type
steps.criteria: GIVEN a policy that sets evidence requirements for 'deploy_production' to min_count 2 with required_types ['decision'] WHEN a low-risk intent for deploy_production is evaluated THEN the policy requirement overrides the default low-risk tier (which requires only 1 of any type) AND the intent needs 2 refs including a decision

steps.name: Intent without matching policy uses default tier requirements
steps.criteria: GIVEN policies exist for 'financial_transfer' and 'deploy_production' but not for 'create_branch' WHEN an intent for create_branch is evaluated THEN the default risk-tier requirements apply AND no policy override is used

steps.name: Observer detects evidence spam pattern across recent intents
steps.criteria: GIVEN an agent has submitted 10 intents in the last hour all referencing the same single decision WHEN the Observer runs an evidence anomaly scan THEN an observation is created with observation_type 'evidence_anomaly' and severity 'warning' identifying the repeated reference pattern

steps.name: Observer detects evidence reuse pattern across agents
steps.criteria: GIVEN 5 different agents have all cited the same 2 evidence_refs across their recent intents WHEN the Observer runs an evidence anomaly scan THEN an observation is created with observation_type 'evidence_anomaly' identifying the shared-evidence cluster

steps.name: Normal evidence usage does not trigger anomaly detection
steps.criteria: GIVEN 3 agents have submitted intents with varied evidence_refs (different decisions and tasks) WHEN the Observer runs an evidence anomaly scan THEN no evidence_anomaly observations are created

steps.name: Governance feed shows verified evidence chain for pending intent
steps.criteria: GIVEN an intent with 2 verified evidence_refs (a confirmed decision and a completed task) WHEN the governance feed is queried THEN the feed item includes evidenceRefs with entityId, entityKind, title, verified for each ref AND evidenceSummary shows verified 2 total 2

steps.name: Governance feed highlights failed evidence with failure reason
steps.criteria: GIVEN an intent with 2 evidence_refs where 1 failed scope check WHEN the governance feed is queried THEN the feed item includes the failed ref with verified=false and failureReason 'scope_mismatch' AND evidenceSummary shows verified 1 total 2

steps.name: Governance feed shows zero-evidence warning for intent without references
steps.criteria: GIVEN an intent submitted without evidence_refs under soft enforcement WHEN the governance feed is queried THEN the feed item includes an evidenceSummary with verified 0 total 0 AND includes a warning indicator for zero evidence

steps.name: New workspace in bootstrap mode allows intents without evidence
steps.criteria: GIVEN a newly created workspace with evidence_enforcement defaulting to 'bootstrap' WHEN an agent submits an intent without evidence_refs THEN the intent proceeds to evaluation without penalty AND evidence_verification shows enforcement_mode 'bootstrap'

steps.name: Bootstrap workspace transitions to soft enforcement when maturity threshold met
steps.criteria: GIVEN a workspace in bootstrap mode with evidence_enforcement_threshold of min_decisions 3 WHEN the workspace has 3+ confirmed decisions AND an intent is evaluated THEN the workspace enforcement mode is automatically updated from 'bootstrap' to 'soft'

steps.name: Admin manually overrides enforcement mode via workspace settings
steps.criteria: GIVEN a workspace in soft enforcement mode WHEN an admin updates the evidence_enforcement setting to 'hard' via the workspace API THEN subsequent intents are evaluated under hard enforcement AND the manual override persists regardless of maturity threshold
